title: Marksman 12v Electric Air Pump - 240v
features: DUAL POWER SUPPLY: The Marksman 12V Electric Air Pump operates on both 12V (car cigarette lighter socket) and 240V (standard home outlet) for maximum convenience.
HIGH-PRESSURE INFLATION: Designed for quick and efficient inflation, ideal for air mattresses, inflatable pools, boats, camping gear, and more.
3 INTERCHANGEABLE NOZZLES: Comes with three different nozzle sizes to fit various inflatable items, ensuring versatility for all your needs.
FAST & EASY OPERATION: Simply plug in, attach the nozzle, and switch on for hassle-free inflation and deflation.
MULTI-PURPOSE USE: Suitable for inflating airbeds, inflatable pools, swimming rings, rafts, yoga balls, and more.
description: The Marksman 12V Electric Air Pump is a powerful and versatile solution for fast and effortless inflation of air mattresses, inflatable pools, boats, and more. Featuring a dual power supply, it works with both 12V DC (car cigarette lighter) and 240V AC (household plug), making it perfect for home, travel, and camping trips. Equipped with three interchangeable nozzles, this air pump can fit various inflatable items, providing maximum flexibility. Its compact and lightweight design ensures easy portability, so you can take it anywhere. Designed for fast inflation and deflation, the Marksman Electric Air Pump allows you to inflate items quickly and efficiently, saving you time and effort. Whether you’re at home or on the go, this powerful yet easy-to-use pump is the perfect addition to your gear!
